description: Auto import JSON files. And provide intelligent auto-completion.
config.title: JSON Auto Import
config.languages.description: Language IDs enabled for this extension.
config.keepExtension.description: Keep the file extension in import paths.
config.variableName.description: Variable naming strategy. 'keep' preserves the original filename. If the filename contains invalid identifier characters (such as '-', spaces, etc.), they will NOT be modified automatically. Please rename them manually.
config.searchPaths.description: Directories to scan, relative to the workspace root. Supports multiple entries. Example: src, src/data, packages/core/assets. All subdirectories will be scanned automatically.
config.excludePaths.description: Directories to exclude from scanning, relative to the workspace root. Supports multiple entries. Example: node_modules, dist, src/generated. All subdirectories will be excluded automatically.
